featureName: BUG-031-001: Integration stack volume retention + non-idempotent migration crash-loops core

executionHistory.summary: Confirmed two cooperating defects: (A) smackerel.sh argv parser is pre-command-only so post-command --volumes is silently dropped; (B) internal/db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql line 512 ADD CONSTRAINT chk_rating_range is non-idempotent and trips SQLSTATE 42710 when test postgres volume survives teardown.

Created bug.md, spec.md (with SCN-031-BUG001-A1, SCN-031-BUG001-B1, SCN-031-BUG001-Pre-fix-fail), design.md (root cause analysis + Fix A/B + audit plan + alternatives), scopes.md (Test Plan, DoD, Change Boundary), report.md (evidence skeleton), uservalidation.md, state.json.

Verified affected lines against HEAD: smackerel.sh argv loop lines 70-96 with break on positional; smackerel.sh down case lines 355-363 reads global DOWN_VOLUMES; tests/integration/test_runtime_health.sh:33 and :41 use post-command --volumes form; internal/db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql:512 confirmed bare ADD CONSTRAINT chk_rating_range. Cross-spec coordination noted with 022-operational-resilience and 027-user-annotations.

Implemented Fix A (positional-agnostic argv parser in smackerel.sh) and Fix B (DO $$ ... EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object guard around chk_rating_range in 001_initial_schema.sql). Added two scenario-specific shell regression tests under tests/integration/ (test_cli_flag_position.sh for SCN-031-BUG001-A1 and test_migration_idempotency.sh for SCN-031-BUG001-B1) and wired them into ./smackerel.sh test integration. Captured pre-fix FAIL evidence and post-fix PASS evidence for both scenarios in report.md. Migration audit of 001/018/019/020 found only the chk_rating_range occurrence in the FR4 audit class; out-of-scope CREATE TABLE non-idempotency in 018_meal_plans.sql declared with uncertainty and left for follow-up. Validation runs: check OK, lint OK, format --check OK, build OK, test unit 330 passed, test integration BUG-031-001 regressions PASS (3 pre-existing TestNATS_* failures in nats_stream_test.go are outside change boundary and originate in other agents' uncommitted Go code). Status remains in_progress pending bubbles.validate certification per bugfix-fastlane.

Re-ran ./smackerel.sh test integration on clean test stack. SCN-031-BUG001-A1 regression PASS: 'PASS: post-command --volumes removed smackerel-test-postgres-data'. SCN-031-BUG001-B1 regression PASS: 'PASS: core reached /api/health on consecutive runs over a retained postgres volume with re-applied initial migration'. Go integration packages both green: tests/integration 19.898s ok, tests/integration/agent 3.100s ok. TestMigrations_AnnotationsConstraints PASS confirms chk_rating_range guard intact. artifact-lint.sh exit 0. Co-resolution with BUG-022-001 closes the integration suite red bar that previously blocked spec-031 certification of bug regressions.

Test phase executed inline by bubbles.validate during certification (bugfix-fastlane). The two scenario-specific shell regression tests (test_cli_flag_position.sh, test_migration_idempotency.sh) plus the full Go integration suite were re-run on a clean stack. All target tests PASS. See report.md Validation Evidence.

Audit phase executed inline by bubbles.validate during certification. Verified change-boundary respect (only smackerel.sh + 001_initial_schema.sql + new shell tests modified), adversarial regression substance, test fidelity, and zero production-code mutation by validate. See report.md Audit Evidence.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: Scope 1 done. certification.completedScopes contains scope-1 and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: Bug packet initialized by bubbles.bug. Implementation dispatch (bubbles.implement) is a separate invocation per bugfix-fastlane workflow.
